sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.reportType
,ap.reportParameters
,ap.reportName
,ap.subscriptionRecurrenceId
,ap.requestedAt
,ap.fileUrl
,ap.processedAt
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.memberId
,ap.AccountInfoId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_ExportSubscription t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.[Name]
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.memberId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_ExternalMembers t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  -- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.FileCabinetFileId
,ap.GeneratedGuid
,ap.DateExpire
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 
inner join dbo.FileCabinetFiles  cf on (ap.FileCabinetFileId=cf.id   )
inner join dbo.FileCabinet  fc on (cf.Filecabinetid=fc.id  )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (fc.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_FileCabinetEmailView t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select ap.Id
,ap.FileCabinetId
,ap.[FileName]
,ap.FileSize
,ap.hollowFilePath
,ap.FileMimeType
,ap.FileAddedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.FilePath
,ap.FileCabinetFolderId
,ap.ReferenceId
,ap.OriginalFileName
,ap.EffectiveDate
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.[Status]
,ap.SessionNoteResponseId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.FileCabinet  fc on (ap.Filecabinetid=fc.id  )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (fc.childProfileId=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
and fc.childProfileId is not null
union 
select ap.Id
,ap.FileCabinetId
,ap.[FileName]
,ap.FileSize
,ap.hollowFilePath
,ap.FileMimeType
,ap.FileAddedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.FilePath
,ap.FileCabinetFolderId
,ap.ReferenceId
,ap.OriginalFileName
,ap.EffectiveDate
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.[Status]
,ap.SessionNoteResponseId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.FileCabinet  fc on (ap.Filecabinetid=fc.id  )
inner join dbo.tblmember p on (fc.MemberId=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
and fc.MemberId is not null
)t1
left join Temp_FileCabinetFiles t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.FileCabinetId
,ap.FolderName
,ap.FolderAddedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.FolderPath
,ap.SharedFolder
,ap.IsSystemFolder
,ap.FolderDescription
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.[Order]
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.FileCabinet  fc on (ap.Filecabinetid=fc.id  )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (fc.childProfileId=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
and fc.childProfileId is not null
union 
select -- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.FileCabinetId
,ap.FolderName
,ap.FolderAddedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.FolderPath
,ap.SharedFolder
,ap.IsSystemFolder
,ap.FolderDescription
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.[Order]
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.FileCabinet  fc on (ap.Filecabinetid=fc.id  )
inner join dbo.tblmember p on (fc.MemberId=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
and fc.MemberId is not null
)t1
left join Temp_FileCabinetFolders t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select -- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.FolderTypeId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.IsHealthcare
,ap.AccountInfoId
,ap.MemberId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
union 
select -- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.FolderTypeId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.IsHealthcare
,ap.AccountInfoId
,ap.MemberId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblmember p on (ap.MemberId=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
and ap.MemberId is not null
--and datecreated <=CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(Year,-2,GETDATE()), 120)
) t1
left join Temp_FileCabinet t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.behaviorPlanDataId
,ap.planId
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.startTime
,ap.endTime
,ap.numberOfTimes
,ap.note
,ap.memberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
--inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_FrequencyData t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select   ap.Id
,ap.IsDefault
,ap.LessonId
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.GoalText
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.masteryCriteriaId 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_IepGoal t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select  ap.Id
,ap.IepGoalId
,ap.Seq
,ap.ObjectiveText
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.masteryValue
,ap.consecutiveDays
,ap.masteryCriteriaId
,ap.IsMaintenance
,ap.IsAutomastered 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
 inner join dbo.IepGoal ieg  on (Iepgoalid=ieg.id ) 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ieg.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_IepObjective t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

,ap.childProfileId
,ap.planStartDate
,ap.planEndDate
,ap.currentPlan
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap

select t1.* from (
select ap.id
,ap.behaviorPlanDataId
,ap.planId
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.intervalStart
,ap.intervalEnd
,ap.[value]
,ap.note
,ap.memberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_IntervalData t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.Name
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.PlanName
,ap.DeletedBy 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
inner join Subscription s on (a.ID=s.accountInfoID)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_KareoInsuranceCompanies t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.customerId
,ap.customerKey
,ap.userName
,ap.password
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.CombineMultiple
,ap.PracticeId
,ap.DeletedBy 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_KareoSettings t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --LPA.*
LPA.id
,LPA.CollectionMethodTypeId
,LPA.settingTrackPrompt
,LPA.settingTrackLatency
,LPA.settingSmallSelection1
,LPA.settingSmallSelection2
,LPA.settingStringField1
,LPA.settingStringField2
,LPA.settingUnitType1
,LPA.settingInt1
,LPA.dateCreated
,LPA.dateLastModified
,LPA.dateDeleted
,LPA.trackObjectives
,LPA.hollowCcId
,LPA.hollowBehaviorTrackingId
,LPA.hollowAccountInfoId
,LPA.IsAutoSavePhaseChangeLine
,LPA.ShowTargetNotes
,LPA.ModifiedBy
,LPA.DeletedBy
,LPA.CreatedBy
,LPA.IsSkillAutomastery
,LPA.IsBehaviorAutomastery
,LPA.TrackIntensityStatus
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} LPA
Inner Join dbo.BehaviorTracking b on (b.LearningProcessAttributesId=LPA.ID )
Inner Join ChildProfile C ON C.ID = B.ChildProfileID
inner join AccountInfo A on C.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
union
select-- LPA.* 
LPA.id
,LPA.CollectionMethodTypeId
,LPA.settingTrackPrompt
,LPA.settingTrackLatency
,LPA.settingSmallSelection1
,LPA.settingSmallSelection2
,LPA.settingStringField1
,LPA.settingStringField2
,LPA.settingUnitType1
,LPA.settingInt1
,LPA.dateCreated
,LPA.dateLastModified
,LPA.dateDeleted
,LPA.trackObjectives
,LPA.hollowCcId
,LPA.hollowBehaviorTrackingId
,LPA.hollowAccountInfoId
,LPA.IsAutoSavePhaseChangeLine
,LPA.ShowTargetNotes
,LPA.ModifiedBy
,LPA.DeletedBy
,LPA.CreatedBy
,LPA.IsSkillAutomastery
,LPA.IsBehaviorAutomastery
,LPA.TrackIntensityStatus
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} LPA
inner join AccountInfo A on A.LearningProcessAttributesId = LPA.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
union
select --LPA.* 
LPA.id
,LPA.CollectionMethodTypeId
,LPA.settingTrackPrompt
,LPA.settingTrackLatency
,LPA.settingSmallSelection1
,LPA.settingSmallSelection2
,LPA.settingStringField1
,LPA.settingStringField2
,LPA.settingUnitType1
,LPA.settingInt1
,LPA.dateCreated
,LPA.dateLastModified
,LPA.dateDeleted
,LPA.trackObjectives
,LPA.hollowCcId
,LPA.hollowBehaviorTrackingId
,LPA.hollowAccountInfoId
,LPA.IsAutoSavePhaseChangeLine
,LPA.ShowTargetNotes
,LPA.ModifiedBy
,LPA.DeletedBy
,LPA.CreatedBy
,LPA.IsSkillAutomastery
,LPA.IsBehaviorAutomastery
,LPA.TrackIntensityStatus
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} LPA
Inner join CurrentCurriculum CC ON LPA.ID = CC.LearningProcessAttributesId
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (CC.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join AccountInfo A on p.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_LearningProcessAttributes t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.LearningProcessAttributesId
,ap.[name]
,ap.code
,ap.pos
,ap.isCorrect
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.ExcludeFromCalculations
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  
inner join dbo.LearningProcessAttributes lp on (ap.LearningProcessAttributesId=lp.id)
 --inner join dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc   on (ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=cc.id)
 --inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (cc.childprofileid=p.id ) 
 --from LearningProcessAttributes LPA
inner join AccountInfo A on A.LearningProcessAttributesId = LP.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_LearningPrompt t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.Id
,ap.AccountId
,ap.CustomCategoryId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
FROM @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.AccountId  )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_LessonAccountCustomCategory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
Where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.LessonId
,ap.hcFormResponseId
,ap.BehaviorId
,ap.ChartTitle
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
INNER JOIN dbo.hcFormResponse fr ON ap.hcFormResponseId = fr.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON fr.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_LessonBehaviorGraphLink t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
Where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.Id
,ap.ClientId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.ClientProgramCustomCategoryId
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
FROM @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join ChildProfile p on (ap.clientid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_LessonCustomCategory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
Where t2.ID is null

select ap.id 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.ClientId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

select t1.* from (select   ap.id
,ap.notes
,ap.notePriorityId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.subscriberId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.memberId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap       
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )t1
left join Temp_LessonNote t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.lessonId
,ap.step
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  inner join  dbo.Lesson l on ( ap.Lessonid=l.id  )
                                        inner join dbo.subscription s on (s.id=l.SubscriptionId   )
										inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (s.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_LessonStep t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
